channel.title: Woodmont Industrial News Feed
channel.description: Daily industrial and CRE updates across key regions

item.title: Chicago-Based Stotan Industrial Launches NASA Causeway Logistics Center in Florida - Connect CRE
item.description: Chicago-Based Stotan Industrial Launches NASA Causeway Logistics Center in Florida Connect CRE
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News

item.title: Newmark’s Chad Lavender: CRE Recovery Gains Ground Across Sectors
item.description: In a recent conversation with NAIOP President and CEO Marc Selvitelli on the Inside CRE Podcast, Chad Lavender, president of capital markets for North America at Newmark, outlined a commercial real estate environment defined by improving liquidity, narrowing bid-ask spreads, and renewed investor confidence across nearly every major asset class.
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: Brielle Scott

item.title: 65-Year-Old FREIT To Liquidate
item.description: The First Real Estate Investment Trust of New Jersey has been investing in commercial real estate since before the Beatles performed on The Ed Sullivan Show. While it far outlasted the Fab Four, the REIT is finally breaking up. The board of directors...
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: sasha.jones@bisnow.com

item.title: Partnerships (and friendships) in focus as NAIOP New Jersey honors industry leaders, deals of the year at annual gala
item.description: NAIOP New Jersey welcomed another sold-out crowd to The Palace at Somerset Park, honoring the industry’s top talent as part of its 39th annual Commercial Real Estate Awards Gala.
item.category: Transactions — Property Sales & Leases
item.author: Joshua Burd

item.title: DHS Inspector Opens Probe Into $38B Warehouse Detention Program

item.title: Advance launches Bridgewater innovation campus with up to 1.1 million sq. ft. of ‘purpose-built’ R&D, advanced manufacturing space
item.description: Advance Realty Investors has unveiled plans to build up to 1.1 million square feet of new life science and advanced manufacturing space in Bridgewater, part of a campus that will have shared amenities to create what it’s touting as a cohesive, end-to-end ecosystem.
item.category: Availabilities — Properties for Sale or Lease
item.author: Joshua Burd

item.title: CenterPoint sells 4.3-acre industrial service facility in Avenel to Jadian IOS, CBRE says

item.title: Energy Shortages Are Threatening The Growth Of Industrial Automation
item.description: As the artificial intelligence-powered data center boom sweeps the country, creating unprecedented demand for electricity, the nation’s industrial developers find themselves fighting for power as the historically low-intensity sector becomes more automated.
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: billy.wadsack@bisnow.com

item.title: Fed Pauses Interest Rates Again as Commercial Real Estate Awaits New FOMC Chair
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell’s last scheduled meeting leading the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) ended with a third straight interest rate hold and signs of growing dissent among the board. The widely anticipated move two weeks before Powell’s second term as chair ends May 15 and two months after the onset of war in […]
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: Andrew Coen

item.title: Fashion Designer Pamella Roland Takes 10K-SF Office at 462 Seventh Avenue
item.description: A renowned Hollywood fashion designer is moving her workspace within Midtown South. Pamella Roland, known for designing evening gowns and cocktail dresses for A-list celebrities, has signed a five-year lease for 10,013 square feet at 462 Seventh Avenue, according to tenant broker Resolution Real Estate. Asking rent was $45 per square foot. Roland will relocate […]
item.category: Transactions — Property Sales & Leases
item.author: Isabelle Durso

item.title: Bain Capital Buys South Florida Industrial Campus for $52M
item.description: Kurv Industrial, formerly called Bridge Industrial, has sold a warehouse campus in Pompano Beach, Fla., for $52 million, property records show. Bain Capital Real Estate purchased the 17-acre asset, called Bridge Point Pompano Beach Commerce Park. The property includes three warehouses totaling 380,496 square feet. All were built in the 1980s and 1990s. The campus, […]
item.category: Transactions — Property Sales & Leases
item.author: Julia Echikson

item.title: NAIDB completes $10.5 million sale of Piscataway industrial building
item.description: A forklift dealer is expanding to Piscataway after acquiring a more than 41,000-square-foot facility just south of Interstate 287, brokers with NAI DiLeo-Bram & Co. said Wednesday.
item.category: Transactions — Property Sales & Leases

item.title: P&C broker NFP acquires The Hamilton Group in Cedar Knolls
item.description: NFP, an Aon company and leading property and casualty (P&C) broker and benefits consultant, announced the acquisition of The Hamilton Group, LLC, a multidisciplinary insurance broker based in Cedar Knolls. The Hamilton Group’s Greg Frankel and David Page will join NFP as senior vice presidents reporting to Lauren Kim, regional managing director of P&C in […] The post P&C broker NFP acquires The Hamilton Group in Cedar Knolls appeared first on ROI-NJ.
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: ROI-NJ Staff
